data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for inspector re-verification and sign-off.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the inspector's re-verification and sign-off process. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this specific functionality. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate actual functionality or API responses that would confirm this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality for inspector re-verification and sign-off.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
